name: 6-Outlet Surge Protector Wall Tap 900J with USB C and USB A - dealworthy™ White
description:
Power multiple devices safely with the 6-Outlet Surge Protector Wall Tap 900J with USB C and USB A from dealworthy™ in White. Equipped with 6 AC outlets and USB-C and USB-A ports for versatile charging, it includes LED warning lights for added safety and grounded AC power. This wall tap's compact, wall-mounted design is ideal for keeping devices charged and protected in any room in an instant.

dealworthy™: Just what you need, priced just right.
